fieldguide.aether.fire_minion.descriptio: Fire Minions are small imitations of the great Sun Spirit. While not individually dangerous, they can quickly ignite and overwhelm you. Make sure to bring fire resistance!
fieldguide.aether.white_flower.descripti: White Flowers are endemic to the Aether, and are infused with the lands' great bounty of wind energy. Their petals are lighter than air, and they are rumored to be sewn from the great Aerwhales...
fieldguide.aether.skyroot_tree.descripti: The primary tree of the Aether. Remarkably similar to Oak. It's off-green colour is due to a natural surplus of chlorophyll.
fieldguide.aether.golden_swet.descriptio: A variant of the Swet. The gel of Swets is quite tasty. Combine it with sugar for a true delicacy!
fieldguide.aether.sheepuff.white.descrip: Sheepuffs are adorable, with insulating wool that feels like clouds. They are ravenous, eating grass and blueberries, to the point where their coats puff out comically. Shear them once to contain the immense floof, and twice to harvest even more wool. Plush toys are often stuffed with Sheepuff wool.
fieldguide.aether.blue_swet.description: Swets are slime-like creatures in the Aether whose sole purpose is expansion. When they encounter a player, they engulf them, sapping their nutrients. To fight back, jump rapidly or find water.
fieldguide.aether.phyg.description: When pigs fly? Close enough. I never thought I'd see the day...
fieldguide.aether.aerwhale.description: Aerwhales are ancient beasts born of the Aether's primordial winds. They are kind, inquisitive, and lumbering. They are also obligate pacifists, seeming to hold life in great value.
fieldguide.aether.purple_flower.descript: Purple Flowers are endemic to the Aether, and laced with microscopic Zanite crystals absorbed from the soil. As such, they are quite heavy, and do not grow tall.
fieldguide.aether.valkyrie.description: Valkyries are honour-bound female warriors who prove their mettle through battle. They respond to any martial challenge with glee, using their powerful flight and wings to corner even veteran combatants. To challenge their queen, you must defeat 10 in battle and claim their medals of honour.
fieldguide.aether.berry_bush_stem.descri: A young blueberry plant. It will one day grow and be feasted upon by the livestock of the Aether. Planted on enchanted soil, it may bear more fruits.
fieldguide.aether.berry_bush.description: A bountiful blueberry bush. It drops one or two blueberries, and then must regrow its leaves.
fieldguide.aether.cockatrice.description: Cockatrice are nightstalking versions of the Moa who have adapted to hunt flesh rather than plants. Their sharp beaks are more than capable of harm, and they can run with aplomb. Beware.
fieldguide.aether.aerbunny.description: Aerbunnies hop around aimlessly, and like blueberries. Aerbunnies can be right-clicked to mount them onto a player's head, and right clicked again to be dismounted!
fieldguide.aether.evil_whirlwind.descrip: Nefarious spirits of air, Whirlwinds delight in flinging any creatures high into the sky, with no regards for their safety. If you are wise, you will be prepared for this. If you are not, stay well away.
fieldguide.aether.moa.description: Moa are noisy, temperamental birds. To be tamed, they must be incubated and fed Aechor Petals from birth. Only then will you have a reliable saddled companion who you can fully trust and control.
fieldguide.aether.flying_cow.description: Flying cows are majestic winged bovines who soar great distances to pursue their great passion of grazing upon the Aether. Breed them with blueberries, and ride them with a saddle. You too can moo with grace and tact.
fieldguide.aether.zephyr.description: Zephyrs are hostile flying clouds that call the Aether home. They fire disruptive gusts at anything they deem threats, and stay safe by hovering in the air. Close the gap and knock'em down!
fieldguide.aether.mimic.description: No Skyroot Chest is truly safe when Mimics are about. These opportunistic creatures are hungry, angry and perpetually bloodthirsty. Beware of opening chests, for you might find the loot can stare right back...
fieldguide.aether.aechor_plant.descripti: Archor Plants are venomous plants with a penchant for pricking any bystander with needles. Moa are resistant to this venom, and can kill and eat these sentient plants without difficulty, even coveting their petals.
fieldguide.aether.golden_oak_tree.descri: Golden Oaks are Skyroot trees which contain glistening Golden Amber. When broken with an Axe, they drop Skyroot Logs, and if the Axe is Zanite or Gravitite, they will drop their Golden Amber.
